title: Home Improvement Siding Business in Oklahoma City
supportTraining: Full training and support by franchisor. No industry experience necessary.
description:
Have you ever dreamed of running a meaningful, home-based business with low overhead costs? This is your chance to get one of the top-performing territories in a quickly growing home improvement franchise. As a business owner, your role will be to manage a team dedicated to providing top-tier customer service to the homeowners, not to handle siding installation just by yourself.

As the business owner, you'll lead a team from the comfort of your home office, using just an iPad, laser tools, and proprietary software.

Business Details:

- Comprehensive training, mentoring, and support in sales, production, and management
- Home-based operation with low overhead costs
- Consistent flow of sales leads provided by franchisor
- Customer service call center handling inquiries for you
- Integrated business management CRM software
- Potential to expand your territory ownership later

Interested buyers will need to complete a two-week training program provided by the franchisor. For further details, feel free to reach out. We're here to assist with any queries you may have.

Ad#:2367468
